rows.label: qev095303_MSG0001
rows.name:
Curious... *fsssh* Humans are
more tenacious than we gave
them credit for, it seems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0002
rows.name:
How can you remain so sanguine?!
*fsssh* This is hardly the time
for off-hand observations![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0003
rows.name:
*fsssh* Given that our prospects of survival
are nonexistent, what harm is there in
acknowledging our co-exterminees' merits?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0005
rows.name:
*fsssh* Is it safe, then, to assume that
our duties are no longer called for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0006
rows.name:
And I do not mean what the Growth expected
of us, but that the very meaning of our
existence may be safely abandoned? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0007
rows.name:
*fsssh* I, too, would prefer
to carry out our sacred mission,
given half a chance...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0008
rows.name:
*fsssh* Then should we not stake our
hopes on that which promises at least
some chance of survival, however slim?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well, I, for one, intend to
survive this ordeal! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0013
rows.name: *fsssh* Then there is no time to waste![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hmm. *fsssh* It is a valid argument.
But in terms of sheer probability—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095303_MSG0012
rows.name:
*fsssh* Humans, we entreat
you—save our kind![ST:wait ]
